settings.heading: Pro Tool Picks
settings.subheading: Our best KRANK tools — selected for you.

analysis: Collection tabs section from Krank theme (hardware). Contains tabbed product collections (Power Drills, Power Saws, Impact Wrenches, Power Grinders) with 5 products per tab. Uses Oswald heading font, Inter body, sharp corners (radius 0), no card shadows. Products show brand (KRANK), tags, price, and color swatches. Recommend 5 columns and 5 products count to match original layout.
